scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: TurnResult replaces MoveData and adds typed transition results, ReplayCheckpoint, GameDeterminismUtility, accessibility state and utility, feedback recipe/budget/performance types, and the executable GameplayAcceptanceMatrix. This is an audited net increase of 14 project runtime script classes (185 to 199) and expands the complete suite from 36/306 to 39/325 scripts/tests. The complete run remains stable at ObjectDB 319 and Resources 141, while TextureStorage, ShapedText, and Font RID allocations remain 11/9/5. No retained Node, Resource growth, or new RID category was introduced.
